title: The World of Vocaloid
description:
Using the Vocaloid music disc pack can make the original discs less boring.
What else can I say? As a newbie resource pack creator... I'm still learning and creating.
This pack may show as damaged or incompatible when importing, but it's actually fine.
body:
Using the Vocaloid music disc pack can make the original discs less boring.
What else can I say? As a newbie resource pack creator... I'm still learning and creating.
Don't worry if it says "damaged" or "incompatible" when you import it — it works just fine.
